title: Verify Remind Me option available from Pause and Cancel intervention modals
description: Test that 'Keep Trial & Set Reminder' option is available in both Pause and Cancel intervention modals
preconditions: User is on Trial Corner hub

steps.description: 2. Verify 'Keep Trial & Set Reminder' option exists
3. Go back and click Cancel Trial button
4. Verify 'Keep Trial & Set Reminder' option exists

expected_result: Both intervention modals display 'Keep Trial & Set Reminder' as high prominence primary action
